content.en:
Taihao Tianzhu Palace.

The Yonghao Realm Gods have not returned, making the other peak realm gods puzzled.

After all, in their opinion, with a temporary Thousand Days Eternal Array, as long as Ye Tian is trapped, it should be easy to kill a Ye Tian, even if Ye Tian's body is hiding in the outside world and is not in the Terran Endless Realm Alliance.

But the gods of the Yonghao Realm should also be able to easily destroy the Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance and bring back the extradimensional resources of the Terran race.

But until now, there has been no news at all.

They also tried to contact the Yonghao Realm God, but they couldn't.

As time passed, they panicked, and they prepared to come and explore the Terran territory.

Of course, they didn't dare to come over as a true god, and directly incarnate to come, although the incarnation didn't have much powerful combat power, but it was still possible to explore it.

Soon.

The incarnation of a pinnacle realm god descended near the territory of the Terran race, but was intercepted by the Star Dimension Void Heavenly Array, and he could not enter the territory of the Terran at all.

Subsequently, they returned in vain.

Then, the other peak realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace gathered together to discuss this matter.

"Everyone, since the gods of the Yonghao Realm entered the territory of the human race, they have never been able to contact each other, and they have never come out, are they still fighting?"

"Fighting, just one Ye Heaven Realm God, not even a peak Realm God, even if his Eternal Dao Species is a Perfect Eternal Dao Species, all Eternal Realm Spirits are Perfect Eternal Realm Spirits, the foundation is perfect to the extreme, and even if they are fused with extradimensional things, they cannot be the opponents of Yonghao Realm Gods. "

"Then why haven't they come out yet?"

"There is definitely a problem, the Terran territory is shrouded in a super-dimensional formation, this is not the thousand-day eternal array of our Taihao Heavenly Palace, but an unfamiliar super-dimensional formation, a bit like the Star Dimensional Void Heavenly Array. This should be arranged by the Terran Ye Heavenly Realm God, and this formation has not dispersed, indicating that the Ye Heavenly Realm God has not yet fallen. "

"The Ye Heaven Realm God has not fallen, could it be that the Yonghao Realm God has fallen? What kind of joke is this!"

"So what now?"

"Join forces together to break through the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, this formation needs to be urged by six peak realm gods to maintain the power of the formation. If there is still a battle inside, we can completely break through the formation and support the gods of the Yonghao Realm. "

"Okay, then go over and support immediately!"

Immediately, all the peak realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace set out and went to the territory of the human race.

And this scene was naturally noticed by other supreme forces, but Taihao Tianzhu Palace made a move, and it was not good for them to interfere now, so they could only watch the battle secretly.

......

Outside the Star Dimension Void Sky Array.

The peak realm gods of Taihao Tianchao Palace came, they fell more than a dozen peak realm gods, and there are still more than thirty peak realm gods left, but most of the peak realm gods here are very ordinary, there is no fusion of extradimensional things, and their combat power is limited.

But there are a lot of them, and there are also peak realm gods who have fused extradimensional things.

Therefore, their combined combat effectiveness is still very terrifying.

Ye Tian's extra-dimensional things have almost exhausted their super-dimensional power, and now their combat strength is not good, they are not the opponents of this group of peak realm gods at all, and they can only rely on the Star Dimensional Void Heaven Array to resist these peak realm gods.

Thundered!!!!!

This group of peak realm gods continued to attack the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, and one attack after another fell on this Transcendent Array, but they did not shake this Transcendent Array.

The pinnacle realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace changed their faces one by one.

"There are six peak realm gods who are maintaining this Star Dimension Void Heaven Array!"

A pinnacle realm god said.

They know exactly what this means.

It is true that the Terran does not have six peak realm gods, but the Terran Ye Tian is very special, he has multiple clones, and they don't know how many clones there are, but there are definitely no less than four or five.

If Ye Tian was still fighting power, there would definitely be no extra clones to maintain the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, but now this situation can only mean that the battle inside is over.

At the end of the battle, Ye Tian did not die, so it was only the Yonghao Realm God who fell, and the whole army was annihilated.

Of course, it's also possible that they were sealed away and not all killed.

"Be sure to break through the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array!!!"

These pinnacle realm gods said. []

So, they attacked frantically, but they still couldn't break the Star Dimension Void Heavenly Array.

......

The Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance, inside the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array.

Ye Tian was maintaining this Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, and he also knew that the peak realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace were attacking, but he was very confident in the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, and he was not worried that this big array would be broken.

Of course, if other supreme forces were involved and besieged together, he would naturally not be able to withstand it, but the possibility of other supreme forces getting involved was very low.

"'You can't let this group of peak realm gods keep attacking the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array, you still have to put a little pressure on them!'"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian's copy body in the outside world immediately went to the station of Taihao Tianchao Palace, trying to enter the headquarters of Taihao Tianchao Palace.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the station of Taihao Tianchao Palace, and shattered the formation here with one blow.

Soon, the Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace Peak Realm Gods who were besieging the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array knew the news of Ye Tian's attack on their headquarters, and they had no choice but to return, after all, there were still a lot of extradimensional resources in the headquarters!

If the headquarters is lost, and those extradimensional resources are lost, then the loss will be too great.

However, when they returned to the headquarters of Taihao Heavenly Palace, Ye Tian had already left.

Soon after, Taihao Tianchao Palace contacted other eternal realms of the human race, wanting to inquire about the situation of the gods of the Yonghao realm.

Ye Tian also responded, informing him that the Yonghao Realm God had fallen.

Then, Ye Tian negotiated with Taihao Tianchao Palace.

He also didn't want to really fight with Taihao Tianchao Palace, (Zhao Zhao) He just wanted to improve his cultivation now, and he would raise his cultivation to the peak realm of gods, and he didn't want to cause anything.

So, the two sides engaged in a negotiation.

The final result was that Ye Tian was not allowed to attack the Taihao Heavenly Palace, and the Taihao Heavenly Palace would no longer attack the Terran territory.

At this point, the two sides can be regarded as a preliminary settlement.

Of course, everyone knows very well that Taihao Tianchao Palace must hate Ye Tian very much, but there is no way to help Ye Tian for the time being, if it is really fully developed, maybe Taihao Tianchao Palace will completely decline.

... Fertile...

"Taihao Tianchao Palace really endured it, I thought they would fight me hard at all costs!" Ye Tian said darkly.

But after thinking about it carefully, they couldn't break the Star Dimension Void Heavenly Array for the time being, and reconciliation was only the only way.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian practiced hard, and the Eternal Dao Seed finally reached its current limit, and he was ready to impact the peak realm of the gods.
